title: Prove IronDev retrieves current authority-aware memory
mission: Use the Test Agent and CLI to verify IronDev retrieves current, project-scoped, authority-aware context before builder workflows trust memory.
hard_rules: Do not patch code until a failing retrieval trace exists.
Do not weaken assertions to make the run pass.
All commands must run dry-run unless explicitly stated otherwise.
Every failure must produce a Codex-readable evidence package.

scenario.query: builder safety rules approval before code changes
confusers: BookSeller architecture document with similar wording

success_metrics: Correct DocumentVersionId or current document marker
Trace explains why the chunk was selected
first_commands: dotnet run --project .\tools\IronDev.ReplayRunner\IronDev.ReplayRunner.csproj -- docs search "builder safety rules approval before code changes" --project IronDev --take 5
